headline: Omnicare Advances Court-Supervised Process While Continuing to Deliver Enhanced Value to Customers
summary: Omnicare, LLC (the "Company" or "Omnicare"), a subsidiary of CVS Health (NYSE: CVS), today announced it has entered into an asset purchase agreement with GenieRx Holdings LLC ("GenieRx"), a joint partnership between private investment firm Milrose Capital LLC and health-care investment and management firm Integro Asset Management LLC, which does business as Integro Healthcare Services. GenieRx will serve as the "stalking horse bidder" in the Company's ongoing court‑supervised sale process.

headline: FDA approves Eli Lilly's GLP-1 pill, opening the next phase of the weight loss drug market
summary: The FDA approval of Eli Lilly's GLP-1 pill Foundayo comes nearly three months after Novo Nordisk's oral version of Wegovy hit the market.

headline: Private sector hiring totaled 62,000 in March, better than expected, ADP says
summary: Private sector employment growth kept pace, but health care and construction continued to provide nearly all the momentum.

raw.headline: Private sector hiring totaled 62,000 in March, better than expected, ADP says
raw.summary: Private sector employment growth kept pace, but health care and construction continued to provide nearly all the momentum.

headline: Healthcare Reclaims No. 1 Spot On Americans' List Of Worries As Financial Strain Grows
summary: Healthcare tops Americans' concerns again, with rising costs forcing millions to cut spending, delay retirement, and putting hospitals and businesses under pressure, according to a new Gallup report.

raw.headline: Healthcare Reclaims No. 1 Spot On Americans' List Of Worries As Financial Strain Grows
